PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE SANCTION ORDER ISSUED ON 6/24/2003 TO ROBERT CHAN, ESQ., IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00, IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE OR AN OBJECTION TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT MOTION IS ADOPTED. MOTION IS ORDERED GRANTED. SANCTIONS ARE ORDERED VACATED. ORDER SIGNED. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: LETICIA PEREZ. MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion to Set Aside Sanction order issued on 6/24/2003 to Robert Chan, Esq., in the amount of $200.00, is scheduled this day.
